items.title: Long Easy Run
items.description: Run 10 km at an easy pace of 6:45-7:15 min/km. Focus on keeping your heart rate in Zone 2 (130-150 bpm).

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: After a 10-minute warm-up, perform 5x800m intervals at a pace of 5:30 min/km with 2 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Full-body weight training session focusing on compound movements. Aim for 3 sets of 10-12 reps for each exercise with 60 seconds rest between sets.

items.title: Tempo Run
items.description: Run 6 km at a tempo pace of 5:50-6:00 min/km. Start with a 10-minute warm-up and finish with a 10-minute cool down. Keep your heart rate around 170 bpm during the tempo segment.
